issues.title: events-maths
issues.description:
Crowdfunding.setGoal(uint256) (contract.sol#75-78) should emit an event for: 
	- fundingGoal = goal (contract.sol#77)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)

issues.title: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
issues.description:
Reentrancy in Crowdfunding.withdrawFunds() (contract.sol#81-85):
	External calls:
	- address(owner).transfer(totalFunds) (contract.sol#83)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- totalFunds = 0 (contract.sol#84)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: immutable-states
issues.description: Crowdfunding.owner (contract.sol#18) should be immutable
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: unchecked-transfer
issues.description: unchecked-transfer detected
issues.recommendation: Check return values or use SafeERC20

issues.title: gas-indexed-events
issues.description: GC: [amount] on Event [ContributionReceived] could be Indexed
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

issues.description: GC: [totalFunds] on Event [GoalReached] could be Indexed

stage2_metadata.security_summary:
Contract Type: Custom
Classification Confidence: 90%
Access Control: role_based
Security Features: Standard
Implementation: Custom from scratch
Subtype: crowdfunding

Reasoning: The contract involves managing contributions towards a funding goal, which does not fit into any standard template like ERC20, ERC721, or Governor. It is a unique business logic specific to crowdfunding.
